full_text:
Yan Zheng 嚴政
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Zheng (嚴政). Officer of Zhang Bao. Killed Bao when defeat was inevitable. Yan Zheng is a fictional character. Yan Zheng was affiliated with Yellow Scarves.
